seed_text: To the body and mind which have been cramped by noxious work or company, nature is medicinal and restores their tone
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing: breeze, sea, sky, coast, yellow spots, green background, endless space.
dan_extract:
pothole, gold, leaf, yellow, grass, dirt, coast, spots, sky, space, breeze, sea, life, death, heaven, earth, blue, green, yellow.

1.  *Pattern:* Everything is spotty and has been here forever.
2.  *tension:* A million tiny, yellow, sticky spots that go nowhere.

claim_status: NO_CLAIM
